evals.prompt: Audit this Shopify store and tell me the top SEO fixes: example.com
evals.expected_output: A full Shopify SEO audit with exact counts, clear scope labels, and prioritized actions.

evals.prompt: Review this Shopify SEO audit report for themancompany.com and tell me what is real, what is overstated, and what matters most.
evals.expected_output: A report-review response that verifies claims against store data and separates supported issues from overstatement.

evals.prompt: Check whether this Shopify store has weak collection SEO, thin product pages, and duplicate product titles: example.com
evals.expected_output: A focused Shopify audit emphasizing collection content, product content, and title duplication with exact counts where possible.

evals.prompt: Give me a technical SEO audit for this Shopify domain and prioritize what the client should fix first: example.com
evals.expected_output: A client-facing technical Shopify SEO audit that uses evidence-backed priorities rather than arbitrary severity labels.

evals.prompt: Audit this Shopify store and tell me if public endpoint limitations mean it should only be a partial audit: example.com
evals.expected_output: A Shopify audit that explicitly classifies itself as full or partial and does not invent exact catalog-wide claims when evidence is incomplete.

evals.prompt: Review this Shopify SEO audit claim: the store has no meta descriptions because og:description is missing on product pages.
evals.expected_output: A review that distinguishes standard meta descriptions from Open Graph tags and downgrades the claim if only social tags are missing.

evals.prompt: Check this Shopify SEO audit and tell me whether missing product tags really deserves to be the top issue.
evals.expected_output: A review that classifies product tags as secondary merchandising or internal-search hygiene unless stronger public evidence shows a larger SEO problem.
